name: O.A.C - World Begins
short_description: Are you a leader? Once you convince your nation you are their leader, it will be time to show the world your own political, people management and military strategy skills. O.A.C aims to be a breath of fresh air in the grand strategy genre that will inspire its own kind of videogames!
detailed_description:
Special Offer


Important Notice: This opportunity is exclusively available to existing O.A.C players before June 10, 2025.


About the Game

Ver: Pre-Alpha

First seize the power in your own country!

O.A.C is working hard to inspire their genre and make itself even better in the grand strategy game category.

Even if you're not exactly a human being...

Each country has its own internal dynamics—political structures, socio-economic systems, and cultural foundations. Religions, ethnic groups, professions, NGOs, national issues, epidemics, natural disasters, economies, and many other characteristics are uniquely defined in each nation.
Amid all of this, craft your own strategy to seize power in your country while appearing to be just an ordinary person.

The Great War – After the Old Government

If you win the struggle for power, your journey in O.A.C is just beginning.
The transformation of global technology has brought about a new era of nano-technological warfare. As powerful nations continue to expand their economies, smaller countries are left as vulnerable targets—trapped with nowhere to go.

You define your own role within the system. Every decision you make and every path you choose will first shape your own destiny, then your nation’s, and eventually the future of all humanity.

The Apocalyptic Period

A rich and futuristic story awaits.
From civilizations beyond the “Known World” to secret global organizations...
From ancient mysteries connecting past and future, to the core question of human existence... everything is ready to be discovered.

As a powerful leader on the edge of an apocalyptic era, you will determine the living conditions of humanity itself.

And remember:
More danger will always await you than any ordinary person.

The O.A.C World Begins!

The O.A.C World Begins!
supported_languages:
English*, Greek, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian
*languages with full audio support
